payload.title: Diversity Committee Meeting
payload.description: MTA Diversity Committee Meeting book for December 19, 2022, covering 2022 and 2023 work plans, executive summary, business and diversity initiatives, DBE certification, small business development program, M/W/DBE and SDVOB contract compliance, capital projects, financial services, asset fund managers, and EEO activities.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.entity_name: MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights
payload.description: Responsible for business and diversity initiatives, DBE certification, contract compliance, EEO programs, and small business development.

warnings: entity.parent_organization is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Parent organizations are relation context. Suggested relation: part_of_agency.

payload.description: The goal for the current year is 70 projects totaling $75 million. To date there are 15 projects awarded totaling $8.9 million, 21 projects in bidding totaling $19.3 million, 10 projects pending an award totaling $7.6 million, 11 projects pending bid opening totaling $11.7 million.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

payload.description: Program to develop and grow emerging contractors through classes, on-the-job training and technical assistance on prime contracts with MTA Agencies, creating a larger pool of diverse qualified contractors who can compete for, and complete MTA construction projects safely, timely and within budget.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
